"""Copy base model to checkpoints dir physically (not symlink)."""
import os
import shutil

src = '/data/base_model/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct'
dst = 'checkpoints/base_model'

if os.path.islink(dst):
    os.unlink(dst)

if os.path.exists(dst):
    # Check if it has the right files
    if os.path.exists(os.path.join(dst, 'config.json')):
        print(f'{dst} already exists with config.json, skipping')
    else:
        shutil.rmtree(dst)
        print(f'Copying {src} -> {dst}')
        shutil.copytree(src, dst)
        print('Done')
else:
    print(f'Copying {src} -> {dst}')
    shutil.copytree(src, dst)
    print('Done')

files = os.listdir(dst)
print(f'Files: {files}')
total_size = sum(os.path.getsize(os.path.join(dst, f)) for f in files if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(dst, f)))
print(f'Size: {total_size / 1e9:.2f} GB')
